items.definition_en: A dishcloth is a cloth used to clean dishes.
items.example_en: She washed the plates with a dishcloth.

items.definition_en: A sponge is a soft material used for cleaning.
items.example_en: He used a sponge to wipe the counter.

items.definition_en: A scouring pad is a rough pad used to scrub pots and pans.
items.example_en: The pan needed a scouring pad to get clean.

items.definition_en: A brush is a tool with bristles used for cleaning.
items.example_en: He cleaned the sink with a brush.

items.definition_en: A dustpan is a flat tool used to collect dirt or crumbs.
items.example_en: She swept the crumbs into the dustpan.

items.definition_en: A mop is a tool used to clean floors.
items.example_en: He cleaned the kitchen floor with a mop.

items.definition_en: A bucket is a round container to carry water or other things.
items.example_en: She filled the bucket with soapy water.

items.definition_en: A broom is a tool with a long handle used to sweep floors.
items.example_en: He swept the kitchen with a broom.

items.definition_en: A dish rack is a frame for drying wet dishes.
items.example_en: She put the clean plates in the dish rack.

items.definition_en: A soap dispenser is a container that gives out soap.
items.example_en: We have a soap dispenser next to the sink.

items.definition_en: Cleaning spray is a liquid used to clean surfaces.
items.example_en: I used cleaning spray on the kitchen table.

items.definition_en: Rubber gloves are gloves made of rubber to protect hands.
items.example_en: She put on rubber gloves before washing dishes.

items.definition_en: A towel is a piece of cloth used to dry things.
items.example_en: He dried his hands with a towel.

items.definition_en: A scrubber is a tool used for hard cleaning jobs.
items.example_en: She used a scrubber on the dirty pot.

items.definition_en: A squeegee is a tool to remove water from flat surfaces.
items.example_en: He used a squeegee to clean the window.

items.definition_en: Washing-up liquid is soap for washing dishes.
items.example_en: She poured washing-up liquid into the water.

items.definition_en: A waste bin is a container for rubbish.
items.example_en: He threw the paper into the waste bin.

items.definition_en: A scrubbing brush is a brush for tough cleaning.
items.example_en: He used a scrubbing brush for the floor.

items.definition_en: A cleaning cloth is a piece of fabric for wiping surfaces.
items.example_en: She used a cleaning cloth on the table.

items.definition_en: A paper towel is a disposable towel made of paper.
items.example_en: He wiped up the spill with a paper towel.
